title: Stack Manifest
description: Per-project manifest for claude-code-framework. Every key is optional — absent key = gate skipped.

language.description: Primary language label (typescript, python, java, go, rust, ...)

packageManager.description: Package manager (npm, yarn, pnpm, pip, maven, gradle, cargo, ...)

commands.description: Shell commands for gates. Absent key = that gate skipped silently.

review.description: Config for the guided security-review triage (core/hooks/scripts/security-triage.sh). All keys optional; an absent key skips that check.

apiDir.description: Directory holding route handlers (default: src/app/api or app/api).

tenantParam.description: Regex of tenant-id param names used in routes (e.g. clientId|tenantId|orgId).

authSignals.description: Regex of tokens that prove a route does auth (your guard fns + session/token/hmac).

cronCheck.description: Regex proving a cron route checks its secret (e.g. validateCronSecret|CRON_SECRET).

publicEnvPrefix.description: Env-var prefix a build inlines into the client bundle (NEXT_PUBLIC_ for Next.js, VITE_ for Vite, PUBLIC_ for SvelteKit/Astro). Set to enable the client-bundle secret scan.

publicEnvAllow.description: Optional regex of known-public env names to exclude (e.g. FIREBASE — Firebase web config is public by design).

ratchets.description: Baseline ratchet gates. Each skips silently if baseline or binary absent.

deadCode.description: Dead-code ratchet command (must exit 1 on regression, 0 on pass, 2 on tooling error).

structural.description: Structural regression command run as a prePush step (e.g. sentrux gate).

steps.description: Ordered step keys resolved from commands.* and ratchets.*

context.description: Context/token budget controls. Absent = no filtering.

filterVerbose.description: EXACT commands whose output is collapsed to its verdict when they PASS (full output always shown on failure). For verbose runners that spend thousands of tokens to say 'all green' — that cost lands in context on every run and stays in the transcript. Matched exactly, never as a substring; composed commands (pipe/redirect/&&) are left alone. Do NOT list typecheck/lint: already quiet when green, and you want the whole error when they fail.

source.description: Source glob patterns for scan/ratchet scope

codeExtensions.description: Extensions that count as code changes (for ratchet skip logic)
